entities.name: Tirzepatide ODT
entities.context: GLP-1 agonist taken as orally dissolving tablet, 2mg dose with Carnitine/B12, requires empty stomach for sublingual absorption

entities.name: Vyvanse
entities.context: Primary stimulant medication taken per Rx in early AM, not to be redosed after 10am

entities.name: Bupropion
entities.context: Dopaminergic baseline medication at 300mg, works synergistically with Vyvanse

entities.name: NAC
entities.context: N-Acetyl Cysteine, 600mg antioxidant and glutathione support supplement, best taken fasted

entities.name: Iron
entities.context: 25mg supplement taken fasted, away from coffee and multivitamin, paired with Vitamin C

entities.name: Vitamin C
entities.context: 500mg supplement that enhances iron absorption 2-3x and supports NAC/glutathione pathways

entities.name: Alpha GPC
entities.context: Acetylcholine precursor at 300-600mg for pre-workout cognitive boost, not taken after 2pm

entities.name: Carnitine
entities.context: Included in Tirzepatide ODT formulation alongside B12

entities.name: B12
entities.context: Included in Tirzepatide ODT formulation alongside Carnitine

entities.name: Fasted Initialization
entities.context: Phase 1 morning protocol focused on metabolic activation and neurotransmitter baseline on empty stomach

entities.name: Metabolic Activation
entities.context: Primary goal of Phase 1 fasted protocol upon waking

entities.name: Neurotransmitter Baseline
entities.context: Establishing dopaminergic and cholinergic foundation via morning stack

entities.name: Glutathione Support
entities.context: Antioxidant pathway supported by NAC and Vitamin C

entities.name: Dopaminergic Synergy
entities.context: Bupropion and Vyvanse working together for dopamine optimization
